overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. The scene begins under a concrete stairwell with anti-corporate graffiti and two individuals camping, transitions to a wet neon-lit street with large digital billboards, and ends at a sheltered building entrance courtyard with outdoor seating.

events.description: camera approaches the two individuals camping under the stairs
camera turns away from the encampment toward the street exit

agents.ego_description: approaches two individuals camping under the stairs, observes them briefly, then turns toward the street exit

notable_agents.action: sitting in a camping chair next to a small table with a lantern
crouching on the ground working on equipment

entered.detail: large concrete staircase leading up to street level
concrete wall with red and black graffiti reading CORPOTHIEVES MUST DIE
folding chair with person sitting next to a small table
small light source illuminating the encampment area
stack of boxes and supplies against the wall

segments.scene_description: Under a concrete stairwell, two individuals have set up a small encampment with a camping chair, table, and lantern. The wall behind them features prominent anti-corporate graffiti. The camera approaches to observe them before turning toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy downtown street with digital billboards

events.description: exits the covered stairwell into the open rainy street with neon lights
continues walking straight along the wet sidewalk passing under large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk in the rain, passing under large digital billboards and neon signs

notable_agents.action: crossing the wet street in the distance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing commercial content
multi-lane wet road with orange lane markings reflecting street lights
orange benches lined along the sidewalk
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a wide rainy city street at night, with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights and large digital billboards. The camera walks along the sidewalk past orange benches while a distant pedestrian crosses the road. Overhead walkways and tall buildings frame the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance courtyard with illuminated seating

events.description: turns off the main street into a sheltered building entrance courtyard
approaches and stops near a person sitting on a bench

agents.ego_description: turns into a building entrance courtyard and approaches a person sitting on an illuminated bench

notable_agents.action: sitting on an orange bench looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: covered entrance to a commercial building with warm lighting
orange benches with integrated lighting underneath
large concrete planters with tropical plants
warm white lights illuminating the seating area

segments.scene_description: Turning off the rainy street into a sheltered courtyard, the camera enters a building entrance area with illuminated orange benches and potted plants. The space is protected from the rain with warm artificial lighting. A person sits on a bench looking at a device as the camera approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, sheltered encampment into a rain-slicked neon metropolis and finally into a warm, protected courtyard. It begins under a concrete stairwell, passing a small camp with a lantern and anti-corporate graffiti before turning toward the city exit. As the camera emerges, the scene opens onto a wide rainy street where wet asphalt reflects the glow of massive digital billboards and towering urban architecture. The camera then glides along the sidewalk past orange benches and distant pedestrians before turning away from the rain and into a sheltered building entrance. Finally, the environment shifts to a cozy courtyard filled with potted plants and warm artificial lighting, where a person sits on a bench looking at a device.
